title: frankeniaceae
intro: The frankeniaceae rank, also known as the Frankeniaceae family, is a group of flowering plants that belong to the order Malpighiales. It is a family of plants that are primarily shrubs or small trees, and they are native to tropical and subtropical regions around the world. The Frankeniaceae family is characterized by its small, white or pink flowers and its ability to thrive in a variety of environments. With only a few genera, the Frankeniaceae family is a relatively small and distinct group within the plant kingdom.
